nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

en.lifeSummary: Godehilde de Vermandois was born in 0935, in Vermandois, France. She had at least 5 sons and 2 daughters with Hugues II du Maine Comte du Maine. She died in 1025, in Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, France, at the age of 90.

ja.lifeSummary: Godehilde de Vermandoisは0935年にフランスバーマンドイスで生まれた。彼女はHugues II du Maine Comte du Maineとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1025年にフランスペイズ ド ラ ロイアーメインエ-エト-ロイアーで90歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Godehilde de Vermandois(은)는 0935년 프랑스 베먼도이스에서 태어났다. 그녀는 Hugues II du Maine Comte du Maine(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1025년 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 맹-트-로이르에서 90세의 나이로 사망했다.
